name: Website Checker
purpose: Check whether http://www.tciallc.com/ is up on a recurring schedule and notify Slack only when the check fails.

trigger.manual: Manual test trigger for operator verification

nodes.name: CONFIG
nodes.notes: First workflow node after the trigger. Store shared constants here instead of n8n global variables.

outputs.ok: true when HTTP status is 2xx or 3xx
outputs.status: HTTP status code or 0 when request fails

safe_failure_handling: Only alert Slack on failed checks.
Use a timeout so the workflow cannot hang indefinitely.
Do not store secrets in workflow code or CONFIG.
Keep the routine in n8n; GitHub Actions should not run this recurring website check.
